text:
86 PRs merged this week. The repo was busy.

We added an avalanche of frontier models: Alibaba Qwen, Amazon Nova, xAI Grok, and Wan2.2 video. All available through the usual endpoints.

We also moved all tiers to hourly pollen refills. If you burn through your allowance, you just wait an hour instead of a month. Makes more sense for how people actually build.

Other updates: Headless auth for CLI logins, a new App Ecosystem dashboard for BYOP tracking, and we scrubbed some corporate marketing speak off the site. We're a hackerspace, not a B2B SaaS platform.

Check the repo for the full changelog. Keep building. 🐝👾

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #buildinpublic #indiedev #llm #webdev #generativeai
